directions_raw: Place oil, ketchup, sugar, vinegar, onion, lemon juice, paprika, and salt into a blender; cover and puree until smooth. Store in refrigerator.

description: A simple Thousand Island dressing recipe with mayonnaise, ketchup, and sweet pickle relish. I made this in restaurant quantities and broke it down. You may have to play with it to suit your tastes.
directions: Mix together mayonnaise, relish, ketchup, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until thoroughly combined, and serve.
ingredient_text: mayonnaise sweet pickle relish ½ ketchup pinch salt pinch ground black pepper
directions_text: mix together mayonnaise, relish, ketchup, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until thoroughly combined, and serve.
combined_text: thousand island dressing green salads salad dressings 1 cup mayonnaise 1 cup sweet pickle relish ½ cup ketchup 1 pinch salt 1 pinch ground black pepper mix together mayonnaise, relish, ketchup, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until thoroughly combined, and serve.
directions_raw: Mix together mayonnaise, relish, ketchup, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until thoroughly combined, and serve.

description: This honey mustard vinaigrette is easy and delicious. It is perfect for dipping in bread or great for dressing a salad.
directions: Gather all ingredients.
Whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well combined.
Pour vinaigrette into a screw-top jar or bottle; seal. Shake before serving.
ingredient_text: ½ olive oil ⅓ balsamic vinegar dijon mustard honey salt pepper taste
directions_text: gather all ingredients. whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well combined. pour vinaigrette into a screw-top jar or bottle; seal. shake before serving.
combined_text: honey dijon balsamic vinaigrette green salads salad dressings ½ cup olive oil ⅓ cup balsamic vinegar 2 tablespoons dijon mustard 1 tablespoon honey salt and pepper to taste gather all ingredients. whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well combined. pour vinaigrette into a screw-top jar or bottle; seal. shake before serving.
directions_raw: Gather all ingredients.
Whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well combined.
Pour vinaigrette into a screw-top jar or bottle; seal. Shake before serving.

description: This creamy lemon sauce makes a tangy salad dressing or a great drizzle over grilled fish. Try it over a butter lettuce salad with grape tomatoes and English cucumber.
directions: Combine lemon juice, zest, garlic, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl. Slowly whisk in olive oil until thickened. Whisk in sour cream until well combined. Transfer dressing to a sealable container.
Chill dressing in the refrigerator, 15 minutes to overnight.
ingredient_text: ⅓ fresh lemon juice lemon zest cloves garlic minced dijon mustard ¼ salt ¼ ground black pepper ½ olive oil ½ sour cream
directions_text: combine lemon juice, zest, garlic, dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl. slowly whisk in olive oil until thickened. whisk in sour cream until well combined. transfer dressing to a sealable container. chill dressing in the refrigerator, 15 minutes to overnight.
combined_text: creamy lemon dressing green salads salad dressings ⅓ cup fresh lemon juice 4 teaspoons lemon zest 3 cloves garlic, minced 2 teaspoons dijon mustard ¼ teaspoon salt ¼ teaspoon ground black pepper ½ cup olive oil ½ cup sour cream combine lemon juice, zest, garlic, dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl. slowly whisk in olive oil until thickened. whisk in sour cream until well combined. transfer dressing to a sealable container. chill dressing in the refrigerator, 15 minutes to overnight.
directions_raw: Combine lemon juice, zest, garlic, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl. Slowly whisk in olive oil until thickened. Whisk in sour cream until well combined. Transfer dressing to a sealable container.
Chill dressing in the refrigerator, 15 minutes to overnight.

description: This recipe for coleslaw dressing is really simple to make. It covers about 6 to 8 cups shredded cabbage.
directions: Combine mayonnaise, sugar, ranch dressing, vinegar, celery seed, Creole seasoning, black pepper, and salt in a jar; place a lid on the jar and shake until dressing is smooth and creamy. Refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.
ingredient_text: mayonnaise ⅓ white sugar ¼ ranch dressing ¼ cider vinegar ¼ celery seed ½ creole seasoning ¼ ground black pepper salt taste
directions_text: combine mayonnaise, sugar, ranch dressing, vinegar, celery seed, creole seasoning, black pepper, and salt in a jar; place a lid on the jar and shake until dressing is smooth and creamy. refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.
combined_text: simple coleslaw dressing green salads salad dressings 1 cup mayonnaise ⅓ cup white sugar ¼ cup ranch dressing ¼ cup cider vinegar ¼ teaspoon celery seed ½ teaspoon creole seasoning ¼ teaspoon ground black pepper salt to taste combine mayonnaise, sugar, ranch dressing, vinegar, celery seed, creole seasoning, black pepper, and salt in a jar; place a lid on the jar and shake until dressing is smooth and creamy. refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.
directions_raw: Combine mayonnaise, sugar, ranch dressing, vinegar, celery seed, Creole seasoning, black pepper, and salt in a jar; place a lid on the jar and shake until dressing is smooth and creamy. Refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.

description: This dressing has a mild raspberry flavor. I usually prepare it with canola oil.
directions: In a jar with a tight fitting lid, combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, mustard, oregano, and pepper. Shake well.
ingredient_text: ½ vegetable oil ½ raspberry wine vinegar ½ white sugar dijon mustard ¼ dried oregano ¼ ground black pepper
directions_text: in a jar with a tight fitting lid, combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, mustard, oregano, and pepper. shake well.
combined_text: raspberry vinaigrette dressing green salads salad dressings ½ cup vegetable oil ½ cup raspberry wine vinegar ½ cup white sugar 2 teaspoons dijon mustard ¼ teaspoon dried oregano ¼ teaspoon ground black pepper in a jar with a tight fitting lid, combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, mustard, oregano, and pepper. shake well.
directions_raw: In a jar with a tight fitting lid, combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, mustard, oregano, and pepper. Shake well.

description: This vinaigrette is nice and tangy but not overpowering. Perfect with a simple green salad. Can be refrigerated for up to 2 weeks.
directions: Place the oil, vinegar, garlic, sugar, salt and pepper into a jar with a tight fitting lid. Close the lid, and shake vigorously to blend. Use right away, or store in the refrigerator for up to two weeks.
ingredient_text: ⅓ vegetable oil ⅓ white wine vinegar cloves garlic minced white sugar ½ salt pinch ground black pepper
directions_text: place the oil, vinegar, garlic, sugar, salt and pepper into a jar with a tight fitting lid. close the lid, and shake vigorously to blend. use right away, or store in the refrigerator for up to two weeks.
combined_text: white wine vinaigrette green salads salad dressings ⅓ cup vegetable oil ⅓ cup white wine vinegar 2 cloves garlic, minced 1 tablespoon white sugar ½ teaspoon salt 1 pinch ground black pepper place the oil, vinegar, garlic, sugar, salt and pepper into a jar with a tight fitting lid. close the lid, and shake vigorously to blend. use right away, or store in the refrigerator for up to two weeks.
directions_raw: Place the oil, vinegar, garlic, sugar, salt and pepper into a jar with a tight fitting lid. Close the lid, and shake vigorously to blend. Use right away, or store in the refrigerator for up to two weeks.

description: I am a big fan of Chick-fil-A's® grilled market salad and their signature zesty apple cider vinaigrette! So, I developed a recipe to fill that craving. This dressing is simply amazing… the zing of the apple cider vinegar, hint of sweet pineapple and tangy lime juice, and warm heat of the freshly cracked black pepper is a sure winner!
directions: Combine water, sugar, and xanthan gum in a small bowl; whisk to create a smooth gel with no lumps.

Combine vegetable oil, vinegar, honey, pineapple juice, lime juice, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and cayenne in a medium bowl. Whisk in xanthan gum gel until dressing is smooth and all ingredients are incorporated. Transfer to a vinaigrette bottle and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
ingredient_text: water white sugar ⅛ xanthan gum vegetable oil ¼ apple cider vinegar ¼ honey pineapple juice lime juice salt coarsely cracked black pepper ¼ garlic powder ¼ onion powder ⅛ cayenne pepper
directions_text: combine water, sugar, and xanthan gum in a small bowl; whisk to create a smooth gel with no lumps. combine vegetable oil, vinegar, honey, pineapple juice, lime juice, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and cayenne in a medium bowl. whisk in xanthan gum gel until dressing is smooth and all ingredients are incorporated. transfer to a vinaigrette bottle and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
combined_text: copycat zesty apple cider vinaigrette green salads salad dressings 1 tablespoon water 1 teaspoon white sugar ⅛ teaspoon xanthan gum 10 tablespoons vegetable oil ¼ cup apple cider vinegar ¼ cup honey 2 tablespoons pineapple juice 2 teaspoons lime juice 1 teaspoon salt 1 teaspoon coarsely cracked black pepper ¼ teaspoon garlic powder ¼ teaspoon onion powder ⅛ teaspoon cayenne pepper combine water, sugar, and xanthan gum in a small bowl; whisk to create a smooth gel with no lumps. combine vegetable oil, vinegar, honey, pineapple juice, lime juice, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and cayenne in a medium bowl. whisk in xanthan gum gel until dressing is smooth and all ingredients are incorporated. transfer to a vinaigrette bottle and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
directions_raw: Combine water, sugar, and xanthan gum in a small bowl; whisk to create a smooth gel with no lumps.

Combine vegetable oil, vinegar, honey, pineapple juice, lime juice, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and cayenne in a medium bowl. Whisk in xanthan gum gel until dressing is smooth and all ingredients are incorporated. Transfer to a vinaigrette bottle and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.

description: This creamy homemade buttermilk ranch dressing is not only perfect for salads but also serves as a delicious dip for veggies, chips, or chicken wings.
directions: Whisk mayonnaise and buttermilk in a medium bowl until smooth. Add parsley, garlic powder, salt, onion powder, dill, and pepper. Whisk until blended together. Place in the refrigerator until flavors have melded, about 20 minutes.
ingredient_text: mayonnaise buttermilk dried parsley garlic powder salt ½ onion powder ¼ dried dill weed ground black pepper taste
directions_text: whisk mayonnaise and buttermilk in a medium bowl until smooth. add parsley, garlic powder, salt, onion powder, dill, and pepper. whisk until blended together. place in the refrigerator until flavors have melded, about 20 minutes.
combined_text: homemade buttermilk ranch dressing green salads salad dressings 1 cup mayonnaise 1 cup buttermilk 1 tablespoon dried parsley 1 teaspoon garlic powder 1 teaspoon salt ½ teaspoon onion powder ¼ teaspoon dried dill weed ground black pepper to taste whisk mayonnaise and buttermilk in a medium bowl until smooth. add parsley, garlic powder, salt, onion powder, dill, and pepper. whisk until blended together. place in the refrigerator until flavors have melded, about 20 minutes.
directions_raw: Whisk mayonnaise and buttermilk in a medium bowl until smooth. Add parsley, garlic powder, salt, onion powder, dill, and pepper. Whisk until blended together. Place in the refrigerator until flavors have melded, about 20 minutes.

description: A wonderful dressing for your favorite salads!
directions: Blend sugar, lemon juice, onion, Dijon mustard, and salt in a blender until smooth. Stream canola oil in a thin stream into the mixture while blender is running. Add poppy seeds and pulse blender a few times, just to mix seeds into the dressing.
ingredient_text: ⅓ white sugar ½ lemon juice diced onion dijon mustard ½ salt ⅔ canola oil poppy seeds
directions_text: blend sugar, lemon juice, onion, dijon mustard, and salt in a blender until smooth. stream canola oil in a thin stream into the mixture while blender is running. add poppy seeds and pulse blender a few times, just to mix seeds into the dressing.
combined_text: lemon poppyseed dressing green salads salad dressings ⅓ cup white sugar ½ cup lemon juice 2 teaspoons diced onion 1 teaspoon dijon mustard ½ teaspoon salt ⅔ cup canola oil 1 tablespoon poppy seeds blend sugar, lemon juice, onion, dijon mustard, and salt in a blender until smooth. stream canola oil in a thin stream into the mixture while blender is running. add poppy seeds and pulse blender a few times, just to mix seeds into the dressing.
directions_raw: Blend sugar, lemon juice, onion, Dijon mustard, and salt in a blender until smooth. Stream canola oil in a thin stream into the mixture while blender is running. Add poppy seeds and pulse blender a few times, just to mix seeds into the dressing.

description: This is a light and lovely salad dressing that lends itself well to a simple and elegant salad. I love to use it on a salad of butter lettuce, arugula, goat cheese, and caramelized pecans - simply delicious!
ingredients: 1 ripe pear - peeled, cored, and chopped
directions: Blend the pear, white wine, garlic, Dijon mustard, white balsamic vinegar, black pepper, and sea salt in a blender until well combined; drizzle the olive oil into the mixture in a thin, steady stream while continuing to blend. Blend a few seconds longer until the salad dressing is thick and creamy.
ingredient_text: ripe pear - peeled cored chopped ½ white wine clove garlic chopped dijon mustard ¼ white balsamic vinegar ground black pepper ¼ sea salt ½ olive oil
directions_text: blend the pear, white wine, garlic, dijon mustard, white balsamic vinegar, black pepper, and sea salt in a blender until well combined; drizzle the olive oil into the mixture in a thin, steady stream while continuing to blend. blend a few seconds longer until the salad dressing is thick and creamy.
combined_text: pear vinaigrette green salads salad dressings 1 ripe pear - peeled, cored, and chopped ½ cup white wine 1 clove garlic, chopped 2 teaspoons dijon mustard ¼ cup white balsamic vinegar 1 teaspoon ground black pepper ¼ teaspoon sea salt ½ cup olive oil blend the pear, white wine, garlic, dijon mustard, white balsamic vinegar, black pepper, and sea salt in a blender until well combined; drizzle the olive oil into the mixture in a thin, steady stream while continuing to blend. blend a few seconds longer until the salad dressing is thick and creamy.
ingredients_raw: 1 ripe pear - peeled, cored, and chopped
directions_raw: Blend the pear, white wine, garlic, Dijon mustard, white balsamic vinegar, black pepper, and sea salt in a blender until well combined; drizzle the olive oil into the mixture in a thin, steady stream while continuing to blend. Blend a few seconds longer until the salad dressing is thick and creamy.

description: This rich and creamy blue cheese dressing is a bold topping for a simple green salad, and takes only seconds to make!
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, cheese, Worcestershire and garlic powder, and process until smooth. Store in tightly covered jar in the refrigerator until ready to serve. Serve over tossed salad greens.
ingredient_text: mayonnaise ½ buttermilk ounces roquefort cheese crumbled worcestershire sauce garlic powder
directions_text: in a blender or food processor, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, cheese, worcestershire and garlic powder, and process until smooth. store in tightly covered jar in the refrigerator until ready to serve. serve over tossed salad greens.
combined_text: roquefort dressing green salads salad dressings 2 cups mayonnaise 1 ½ cups buttermilk 8 ounces roquefort cheese, crumbled 2 tablespoons worcestershire sauce 1 teaspoon garlic powder in a blender or food processor, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, cheese, worcestershire and garlic powder, and process until smooth. store in tightly covered jar in the refrigerator until ready to serve. serve over tossed salad greens.
directions_raw: In a blender or food processor, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, cheese, Worcestershire and garlic powder, and process until smooth. Store in tightly covered jar in the refrigerator until ready to serve. Serve over tossed salad greens.
